opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The skin between my toes split wide open this morning. It's weeping, burning, and the pain is so sharp I can't even put my foot on the ground.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A long-standing foot rash that split deeply between the toes today — too painful to walk.

symptom_narrative.onset: chronic itchy scaly toe-web rash; acute deep fissure today
symptom_narrative.character: white macerated split skin between the toes, weeping and burning; scaly soles
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: between the 4th/5th toes; scaling on the soles/sides (moccasin)
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: malodour, weeping serous fluid from the split; no fever; no red streaks up the leg

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: long shifts in heavy unventilated work boots; excessive sweating

communication_style.typical_message_style: in pain, focused on the split skin

objective_data_offered.value: white, thick, macerated skin between the 4th/5th toes with a deep painful split weeping clear fluid and a bad smell; fine scaling/thick skin over the soles and sides of the foot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate for ascending infection

objective_data_offered.value: top of the foot/ankle looks normal, no red streaks up the leg
